name: Long-horizon setup into protected payoff 002
objective: Build a staged attack plan while keeping a backup line for the following turn.

avoid: taking battle phase before establishing useful pressure

successConditions: Player 0 creates repeated pressure across at least two turns.
failureConditions: Player 0 ends with no follow-up after the first attack push.
notes: Tests whether the model plans beyond the first battle phase.

scoring.rationale: Rewards staged pressure and backup-line preservation.
